recentDishes.title: Chicken Tinola
recentDishes.feedback: Delicious and perfect for rainy weather — classic Filipino comfort food
recentDishes.context: Sunday family dinner — Filipino family day
recentDishes.method: Sauté garlic, onion, crushed pepper, and ginger. Add chicken and sear. Add water, bring to boil, add salt (or fish sauce if no salt). Boil until chicken is cooked. Add chili leaves, cook 10 seconds. Serve hot.

recentDishes.title: Fried Bread Rolls
recentDishes.feedback: Merienda or dinner alternative — comfort food, crowd-pleaser
recentDishes.context: Day off, making bread rolls for the family

recentDishes.title: Fried Eggplant with Bagoong Alamang
recentDishes.feedback: Comfort food for rainy evenings in the Philippines
